entry.title: Re: SAP Community Fan Shop
entry.content: Exist any merchandise for SuccessFactors?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,  

Good day!

My name is Tuan, come from Vietnam and I am a beginner with SAP. I have been working in the ICT field for 17 years as an IS engineer, and now I would like to improve my potential by pursuing SAP. From my point of view, SAP is one of the world's preeminent application software which helps many businesses all over the world optimize their production and business operations.
I would be grateful for a free certification attempt to start my new opportunities ahead.
Thank you very much.

Tuan Nguyen

entry.title: Re: Hourly based Schedule line(Purchase,ME38) via Classic MRP
entry.content: Hello @Caetano , Do you have any insights on this topic.

entry.title: Re: Could not join any group
entry.content: If you could please reach out to community@sap.com we can take a look at your user and see what is going on.

entry.title: Re: Posting a rounding difference
entry.content: Hi @marinakisel, the issue was that instead of looking at the account values as a YTD number and then calculate, it calculates each month and then sums up the results of the calculation. The Data Action seems to be working now. Thanks

entry.title: FBRA Reset not possible in Present period
Re: SAP_IPA_13300: Unable to get environment (ID: default)
entry.content:
The error was probably due to a bug that came with the new version of BPA recently released.

Now it doesn't appear anymore and I was able to deploy without problems.

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: SOAP using communication arrangement
entry.content: I am not sure about the HTTP related issue but for the second issue it is a limitation on SAP side as you cannot maintain the SOAP action in the Communication Arrangement app. You would only be able to use the CREATE_BY_URL method to call the SOAP service by specifying the SOAP Action using the method SET_SOAP_ACTION.

entry.title: Re: MRP run not creating planned order via tcode /SAPAPO/CDPSB0 - Production Planning Run
entry.content: Tried this but even after getting no planned order - https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/basic-configuration-of-embedded-pp-ds-in-s-4-hana/ba-p/13488371

entry.title: Compensation plan template is not visible in Import Employee Data
entry.content:
I  created a new compensation plan template and am trying to define eligible users for comp publishing via Basic Import option. However, I am unable to see the comp plan template created in Basic Import > Compensation Options > Compensation template drop down.

Has anyone experienced the same issue?

entry.title: Re: Compensation plan template is not visible in Import E...
entry.content:
Hi @AJFelix 

Check if you have this checkbox checked in Actions for all plans > 

 

If it is checked then you need to give yourself access to the template in RBP.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: SAP and Selected Partners Collaborate to Provide New PLM Integration Add-ons
entry.content:
Dear PLM community,

 When it comes to product definition and development, we all know that flexibility is key. There are many reasons why companies may use a variety of PLM systems to bring their ideas to life. To get your PLM data into your SAP system, a smooth data handover between these systems is vital for successful product development. This is why SAP strives to offer you the right tools to transfer your engineering data into your SAP ERP system, be it SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SAP S/4HANA, or SAP ERP. And in 2024, an integration should be easy to set up and configure, so that you can best support the processes you really need.

PLM system integration is well-known as the next generation integration to Siemens Teamcenter.  And this fall, we have great news for you:

Expand Your Range

As announced earlier this year, one big focus topic has been to expand the range of external PLM systems you can connect to your SAP system using PLM system integration. To this end, we collaborated with experienced development partners to add new PLM add-ons to our product family. Together with PLM system integration, these add-ons offer you tailor-made integration capabilities via the following integration products:

 

PLM system integration, add-on for Windchill

Use this add-on to integrate SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SAP S/4HANA, or SAP ERP with PTC Windchill, a product lifecycle management (PLM) software that helps manage product data and processes throughout the product development lifecycle. Manage effectivity and quality in a reliable and secure way.

Integration With SAP Solutions

Explore the possibilities with PLM system integration, add-on for Windchill that allow your Windchill system to seamlessly communicate with SAP S/4HANA and SAP ERP systems. This integration is designed to support a variety of SAP deployment models, including public cloud, private cloud and on-premise solutions. This flexibility ensures that our solutions can meet the diverse needs of our global client base, adapting to various IT landscapes and business requirements so you can benefit from enhanced PLM capabilities.

Streamlining Operations: Available Key Business Processes

The first release, PLM system integration, add-on for Windchill 3.0, supports key business processes for Change and Release Management to streamline product updates like New Product Development and Introduction (NPDI) for faster product launches, and Minor/Major Change Process for managing product revisions efficiently. Additional processes will be included in future releases to enhance your PLM capabilities further.

 Enhanced Features for Comprehensive Business Processes

Our first release of PLM system integration, add-on for Windchill features a rich list of capabilities designed to empower engineers and product development teams.

  1. Windchill Parts to SAP Materials Transfer
    Focused on being invisible to the Windchill user’s eye, our background-first integration will transfer Parts from Windchill to SAP as they reach a certain maturity, enhancing the maintenance of material masters and aligning product revisions across systems.
  2. BOMs Under Version Control
    Maintain version-controlled bills of materials within SAP through the integration, ensuring data integrity and transparency across engineering and supply chain departments.
  3. Change Management Integration
    Trigger change management processes in SAP based on engineering changes in Windchill, aligning operations and engineering more closely.
  4. Document Management Integration
    Create and manage document info records directly from Windchill and replicate lightweight viewing files from Windchill to SAP. This provides all stakeholders with access to critical 3D visual data and delivers drawings to the workers on your shop floor, thereby improving master data quality and process integration.
  5. Cross-system Data Federation
    Show critical business data within Windchill, providing a holistic view of the material master, bills of materials, change objects, document info records and more.

Looking Ahead: Future Road Maps and Innovations

As we continue to innovate, our future releases are set to introduce even more robust features:

  • Release 3.1 "Manufacturing Integration" (Q1 2025)
    Includes integration of process plans from Windchill MPMLink, plant-specific material master creation, and advanced classification handling to enhance manufacturing operations and data management.
  • Release 3.2 "Product Variability" (Q3 2025)
    Focuses on advanced engineering changes driven from SAP, supplier information exchange, and extensive support for variant configurations, ensuring a versatile and dynamic approach to product lifecycle management.

Take a closer look at what’s to come in the SAP Road Map Explorer.

Empowering the Future of Product Lifecycle Management

With the integration of Windchill with SAP Software through PLM system integration, add-on for Windchill, your organization can achieve unparalleled efficiency and clarity across your product development processes. Our continuous commitment to enhancing PLM integration capabilities ensures that your enterprise remains agile and data-driven, ready to meet the challenges of tomorrow’s market dynamics.

 

PLM system integration, add-on for 3DEXPERIENCE

This new add-on integrates SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SAP S/4HANA, or SAP ERP with Dassault 3DEXPERIENCE, a product lifecycle management (PLM) software that enables users to develop and validate product designs in a collaborative environment, and to create and visualize virtual twins of products, processes, and operations. Dassault 3DEXPERIENCE offers a central platform that connects people and their ideas with data to create innovative products and services.

Discover the potential of integrating your SAP system via this add-on, to enable seamless data exchange between your Dassault 3DEXPERIENCE system and SAP S/4HANA and SAP ERP systems. Our integration is tailored to accommodate integration with SAP S/4HANA, including public cloud, private cloud, and the on-premise solution, as well as SAP ERP to give you maximum flexibility, whatever your system setup may be. Leverage enhanced PLM capabilities and access your PLM data whenever and wherever you need it.

Comprehensive Features for Flexible Business Processes

Enjoy the wide range of capabilities that our first release of PLM system integration, add-on for 3DEXPERIENCE has in store for a smooth collaboration of engineering and product development.

  1. 3DEXPERIENCE Engineering Items to SAP Materials or Products
    Transfer classic enterprise-level bills of material, including date effectivity, from Dassault 3DEXPERIENCE to SAP, to improve process efficiency by working on aligned structures across all domains. Transfer information on geometric-instance occurrence at a BOM-item level for BOMs under version control.
  2. BOMs Under Version Control
    Realize advanced BOM management by maintaining alternative UoMs for material masters, enabling engineers to maintain the required unit of measure within the product structure.
  3. Change Management Integration
    Start change management processes in SAP based on the creation and maintenance of changes in 3DEXPERIENCE, sharing information between engineering and the extended supply chain.
  4. Document Management Integration
    Replicate Dassault 3DEXPERIENCE files into an SAP content repository to improve master data quality and share semantic information
  5. Revision Level Support
    Transfer revision levels of document info records and material masters as part of a change process and create revision levels based on a document or product version entity.

Looking Ahead: Future Road Maps and Innovations

As we continue to innovate, you can look forward to more and enhanced features:

Take a closer look at what’s to come in the SAP Road Map Explorer.

All relevant information on PLM system integration is available via the links below.

  • PLM system integration for SAP S/4HANA
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud: PLM System Integration With Non-SAP Systems
  • PLM system integration for SAP ERP
  • SAP Product Availability Matrix (SAP login required):
    • Matrix for PLM system integration 3.0 for SAP S/4HANA
    • Matrix for PLM system integration 2.0 for SAP ERP
  • SAP Roadmap Explorer:
    • SAP Roadmap for PLM system integration

And last but not least –  contact us via our excellent forum if you have any questions.

entry.title: Re: How can I get Screen Personas to function in the busi...
entry.content:
Did you test with SAP GUI and Business Client both fully updated, with their latest available release and patch level?

If yes, then as long as the theme used in your SAP GUI is the same as in the Business Client, the flavors should work the same. If they do not, that seems to be a problem related to the Business Client, and I suggest opening a support incident for component BC-FES-BUS.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One Sales - Services App - How to config...
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Configuration of Sales app on B1 SQL is very simple; install the app on mobile phone, open it and input Web server address and Port, once you configured your SAP Business One with a public domain name and a trusted certificate. 

Don't consult with SAP Note #3110082 - SAP Business One Sales or SAP Business One Service mobile app requires a valid SSL certificate in SQL environment. the provided solution is not good for security and user experience. 

It would be good to use a reverse proxy solution to serve as a single endpoint exposed to internet behind all the SAP Business One Services and MS SQL in the private network. 

For more detail, refer to my blog and enclosed webinar link there.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/best-practices-for-technical-implementation-of-sap-business-one-web-client/ba-p/13801658

The suggested solution is not only for the web client but also for modernizing SAP Business One landscape.

 

Regards

EunSeok

entry.title: How to create non-GST specific account key and GL
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are trying to create a new account key want to know how to create a non-GST specific account Key and Gl in s4hana Public cloud. 

Regards

Pallavi

SAP SRM - Shopping Cart (tutorialspoint.com)

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Re: shopping cart in MM for SAP Help
entry.content: I saw you already tagged SRM so NVM.

entry.title: Re: Managing Integration Points Made Easy: Dive into the Configuration Manager’s End Points Feature
entry.content: Thanks for the great post on the Configuration Manager’s End Points feature! Your explanation make managing integration points much easier. The way this tool enhances efficiency and gives more control to users is impressive. There are only benefits to using these improvements!

entry.title: Maintenance call dates
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a Maintenance Plan of the cycle of 1 Year, start of cycle - 01/05/2022 and Call Horizon is 30 Days. There are no shift factors or Tolerance set up. For this year why the work order got created automatically on 29/03/2024 instead of 01/04/2024.

Regards,

Preethi

Hi Team,

 

I have shared my details on given email. Kindly do register and add my number in group . So that I can attend the event.

Thanks 

Sushil

entry.title: 🔵Exploring Google AI Advancements and Integration with Generative AI Hub
entry.content:
In this session, we will explore the latest Google AI updates from Google Next 2024. We will also examine how Generative AI Hub integrates with Google AI models. Furthermore, we will take a deeper dive into Google Generative AI models available via the Generative AI Hub and explore real-world business use cases that leverage the combined power of SAP and Google AI technologies.

 

Speaker: Ekaterina Kruse

In case the manager or supervisor is on vacation, for example, what can we do?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Creating Approval Process flow in SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
Is there any possibility that the approver is a group of people?

In case the manager or supervisor is on vacation, for example, what can we do?

Thanks

entry.title: FM: ALM_ME_FUNCLOC_INSTALLED_EQUI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am new in ABAP. I want to use the FM: ALM_ME_FUNCLOC_INSTALLED_EQUI and write a report where i enter several Functional Locations (TPLNR) on selection screen and in the output i can see all the equipments and respective functional locations. Can someone guide me? 

In SE37 i can do it successfully but unable to build a report.

Akash

entry.title: Filter activities in Continuous Performance Management by date?
entry.content:
I would like to know if there is a way to filter activities in Continuous Performance Management by date?  I see that we can do it for Achievements (although it doesn't work for all views), but can't find anything for Activities. 

The activities from previous years create a lot of visual "noise" for my employees, and are becoming an irritant.  They would like to a view of what is current.  Same problem for meetings, because it shows all of the achievements, not just by specified period.

Thanks!

entry.title: Functional Highlights of the New 3.0 FP01 Release of PLM System Integration for SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear PLM community,

with summer coming to an end, we need some good news to lift our spirits. So our new release 3.0 FP01 of PLM System Integration for SAP S/4HANA comes just at the right time!

Grab a coffee, sit back, and find out what you can expect from us this fall:

Integration of Multiple External PLM Systems

PLM system integration now supports the connection of multiple external PLM systems with your SAP S/4HANA system (N:1). For each external system, you can maintain deviating configurations, based on the logical instance and the application.

So no matter what scenarios you want to set up, PLM system integration is here to support your individual business requirements.

Expand Your Range

As announced earlier this year, one big focus topic has been to expand the range of external PLM systems you can connect to your SAP system using PLM system integration. To this end, we collaborated with experienced development partners to add new PLM add-ons to our product family. Together with PLM system integration, these add-on offer you tailor-made integration capabilities via the following integration products:

 

PLM system integration, add-on for Windchill

Use this add-on to integrate SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SAP S/4HANA, or SAP ERP with PTC Windchill, a product lifecycle management (PLM) software that helps manage product data and processes throughout the product development lifecycle. Manage effectivity and quality in a reliable and secure way.

For more details, check out our dedicated blog post.

 

PLM system integration, add-on for 3DEXPERIENCE

The second of our new add-ons integrates SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SAP S/4HANA, or SAP ERP with Dassault 3DEXPERIENCE, a product lifecycle management (PLM) software that enables users to develop and validate product designs in a collaborative environment, and to create and visualize virtual twins of products, processes, and operations. Dassault 3DEXPERIENCE offers a central platform that connects people and their ideas with data to create innovative products and services.

For more details, check out our dedicated blog post.

 

What Else is New in PLM system integration for SAP S/4HANA?

Besides the innovations above, we further improved on your trusted PLMSI add-on to deliver you a range of new functions. Enjoy!

New Monitoring Capabilities Thanks to the PLMSI Workbench

The PLMSI Workbench is a reporting tool that enables power users and administrators to monitor, maintain, and modify PLMSI objects.

  • Search for errors, warnings, and other message types of log and status messages for inbound and outbound data transfer.

  • Take action to fix issues directly from the tool.

Support of Additional Material Master Views

As of this new release, you can define additional material master views, for example, for Accounting or Costing, leveraging BRF+.

  • Practice advanced field control to ensure that you only transfer the business data that you really need.

  • Improve master data quality and enhance transparency between the engineering department and the extended supply chain.

Historically End the Validity of Variant Option Rule Assignments

You can remove variant option rules historically as part of a variant configuration (VC) model transfer.

  • Handle the assignment of a procedure or a constraint with the related change number.
  • Improve data quality and consistency across different domains.

Receive Table-Like Structures for Extensibility Fields

You can now transfer table-like structures for extension fields of certain business objects, to map extension fields that have the same key but different subkeys.

  • Limit data transfer to the business data you really require.
  • Transfer the right semantic information for state-of-the-art data quality.

Business Content

As for each feature pack, we have updated our comprehensive set of business content (BC) sets to help you configure your system with ease. For details, see Initial Configuration.

 

For a comprehensive list of our new and enhanced features for release 3.0 FP01, check out our What's New Viewer.

All relevant information on PLM system integration is also available via the links below.

  • SAP Help Portal
    • Documentation of PLM system integration for SAP S/4HANA
  • SAP Product Availability Matrix (SAP login required):
    • Matrix for PLM system integration 3.0 for SAP S/4HANA
  • SAP Roadmap Explorer:
    • SAP Roadmap for PLM system integration

 

And last but not least –  contact us via our excellent forum if you have any questions.

entry.title: 🔵Integrating Generative AI in SAP S/4HANA with ISLM
entry.content:
Are you looking to equip yourself to harness the power of AI and generative AI? Join us to explore the capabilities of Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management (ISLM), a powerful framework that seamlessly integrates AI into business applications. Discover how ISLM enables the creation and management of AI use cases using SAP HANA ML, SAP AI Core, and SAP AI Services available through SAP BTP. Discover ISLM’s advanced features and stay ahead with insights into its ongoing evolution to easily incorporate generative AI.

 

Speaker: Priti Dhingra and Abhishek Mishra

entry.title: Re: Cmpy code XXXX, actg principle IFRS: 1 Fixed assets with processing errors Message no. AB252
entry.content:
Hello,

Have you found a solution for this error,  we are having the same error after systeme conversion from ECC to SAP S4 while executing FAGLGVTR 

 

Cordially,

RABAH

entry.title: Re: How to work with Standard Migration Object in Migration Object Modeler App
entry.content:
Hi Frank,

Thanks for your valuable insight. I have made the changes.

Thanks and Regards,
Moumita.

entry.title: Re: FM: ALM_ME_FUNCLOC_INSTALLED_EQUI
entry.content:
Hi,
The FM: ALM_ME_FUNCLOC_INSTALLED_EQUI accepts only single functional location at a time. you can search for a different function module or any released API for this purpose.

Or you can create an internal table using the table type of this data element 'TPLNR' and call the FM inside the loop.

Note: Try using FM 'ALM_ME_ML_FLOC_INST_EQUI' fill in the table 'IT_FUNCLOC_INST_EQUIS' if it works for your case.

entry.title: Simulation cannot be created: Could not add BOM component to configuration session
entry.content:
Hello!

We are in S4 Public Cloud and I am trying to simulate variant configuration model. We are using Order BOM as process and here is how the config profile looks like:

Now I am trying to simulate by entering the following parameters:

And when I hit OK I get the following error message: "Could not add BOM component xxxxxx to configuration session".

Note that - there are two components in the BOM and the error is generated for one component. The other is working fine as I have tested that in the sales order variant config screen:

Any idea what may cause this issue? I have tried this in our starter system and it works fine - we are facing this error in the customizing system.

  Any input would be highly appreciated.

 

Thank you

Snigdhodeep

entry.title: Re: SAP CDS view move from NONDESNOTCONNECTED to a new Ca...
entry.content: I believe, you can drag and drop into a correct catalog. Otherwise, try this option. Choose the option to Replicate DataSources by clicking on source system option in left panel. select your s/4 system and search for your datasource and replicate. This will refresh the metadata and help connect the CDS view to the correct catalog. If the system prompts for a specific InfoArea or application component, select the appropriate one where the CDS should reside.

entry.title: Re: Simulation cannot be created: Could not add BOM component to configuration session
entry.content: I figured the issue. The component which was causing the error had a special procurement key that pointed to another location. Now the component was not defined in that source location. The error was resolved upon extending the component to the source location.

entry.title: Re: Flow Function of the Month: Dismiss Keyboard 🏆
entry.content: Well, that seems to be odd. If the onBlur doesn't work as expected you can potentially try with the 'onSubmitEditing', however that might be tricky on a native runtime. One thing is beyond doubt if there is no logic that would bring the input field back in focus, the keyboard should not appear again.

entry.title: Re: Simulation cannot be created: Could not add BOM compo...
entry.content: I figured the issue. The component which was causing the error had a special procurement key that pointed to another location. Now the component was not defined in that source location. The error was resolved upon extending the component to the source location.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

As a (CPI) consultant, I am focused on enhancing my expertise and staying at the forefront of industry trends. I am actively pursuing certifications to upgrade my skills, ensuring I am well-equipped to deliver greater value to my clients. This will also enable me to access broader opportunities for career advancement and growth.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Muhammad Sanan

entry.title: $session.user in CDS for Analysis for Office
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to add current user as a parameter to a CDS View which is used in Analysis for Office.

I have tried both ways:

- as a parameter:

   @Environment.systemField : #USER

    p_uname                      : syst_uname,

This is just not working, parameter is not showing in the Variables list.

- as a filter:

  @Consumption.filter: {selectionType: #SINGLE, multipleSelections: false, mandatory: true}

  $session.user as SessionUser

This generates an error when CDS View is opened in Analysis for Office:

'cds variable!cds_f_user is not formally, correctly defined' .

SAP ABAP release is 758.

What am I missing?

 

Thank you,

Alina

SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative May 2024 Bootcamp Guide

I am a Working Women in pharma industry and I am interested in developing skills in SAP software.and I want to switch my career to be an SAP Consultant, I would really like to become a participant in this Digital skills Initiative programme. Thank You

I am using the Trial account of SAP BTP Cockpit, however there is not SAP Datasphere in "Add Service Plans". 

How can I add it? I would like to test it. 

Thank you

entry.content:
Hi @LudoNoens 
Congratulations for this post series! Thank you for sharing it!

entry.title: Re: Katowice - SAP Stammtisch 10.09.2024
Task Center not attributing tasks correctly
entry.content:
I am connecting SAP Build Process Automation My Inbox, and Task Center, in the same subaccount.

I have done the steps from: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/using-same-subaccount

I have configured Task Center with a booster and configured the destinations properly, and it is working, the tasks are being retrieved, but I am not being assigned as an approver to the task.

I already configured Cloud Identity Services, and e-mail as Subject Name Attribute.

I tried to refresh tasks, by removing and adding the property "tc.enabled" from "SAPBuildPA" Destination, and it did not work too.

entry.title: Re: Missing SAP Datasphere in Trial Account
entry.content: According to https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/serviceCatalog/sap-datasphere?region=all&tab=service_plan there is no trial of SAP Datasphere.

entry.title: Re: Schedule lines per hour
entry.content: Hello Ivan, Did you get any insights on it, am also checking for the same solution can it be create hourly basis so we can share to suppliers

entry.title: Public Cloud - CDS Development - Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are implementing SAP Public Cloud and have some requirements that has to be addressed by custom development. There are few questions in using CDS Views in SAP Public Cloud Only and use the view in SAC Live and Data Acquisition models?

1. Can I use Eclipse IDE for creating CDS views? SAP Note: 3016104 suggests it cannot be used?

2. Is it necessary to have COMPOSITE and CONSUMPTION views and associated annotations like @analytics.category: #CUBE and @analytics.query: TRUE - Any restrictions?

2. Once the CDS is created using Eclipse, what is the Binding Type to be used? InA-UI, OData V2 Web API?

3. Are there any step by step process?

Thank you,

Arthur.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements Input Field Locked With Busy Indicator...
entry.content:
Hi,

No, I haven't solved the problem. I'm still looking for a solution. But, in my case that field has associate custom help value abd the help value couse the field locked when select value.

If I found the solution, will be a pleasure to share with the communiti.

Regards,

entry.title: Storage of small parts in an (automatic) high-bay rack
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Structure: 6 storage locations of different sizes, each containing a box of the same size.
These locations are all available several times.
The filling quantity of the boxes varies depending on the material (upper limit of filling quantity determined empirically).
Mixing with other materials is not desired.
An addition of the same materials up to the max. quantity is desired.

Example: goods receipt 300 pcs. of screws
In the Material master record at sight LVS2 3 boxes/ LET are stored, LET1= 200 pcs, LET2=100 LET3=50 pcs

At the GR a TO is created with 2 positions, 1x200 on LET1 & 1x 100 pcs on LET2.
But... The result in the TO: The storage bin K1 with LET1 is filled with 300pcs. - 100 pcs. above the maximum

So: Neither the capacity check nor the finding of the correct 2nd storage bin fails (the LET occupies 1 unit, the storage bin has capacity 1, therefore only one LET per bin)
Storage type Putaway strategy L, LET check activated, capacity check activated, check method 3 & 4,
Storage bin type, storage unit type defined and assigned
Putaway strategy P also tried, but fails due to the length of the storage bin designation (max. 10 characters incl. /01 etc.)

No error messages, but the system ignores the limits and simply adds stock (which is what the strategy specifies) SU management is not activated for the storage type.

Does anyone know how to map the desired scenario?

 

Greetings,

Roy

entry.title: S/4HANA Security Guidance
entry.content:
What are the best practices for implementing the SAP S/4HANA security baseline? We have defined parameters and critical authorization in our SAP ECC systems as per security baseline. Are there any new or crtical parameters or authorizations have been introduced in S/4HANA which we have to take care of and can be mentioned in baseline security guardrails of an organisation.

Happy to hear from anyone who has worked on this and share their experience.

entry.title: Re: SAP datasphere unable to see space tables in SAP hana...
entry.content:
Hello, 

DB users on Space-level can only consume exposed views.  We could have read access to tables with only the database analysis user. Please note that you should only create a database analysis user to resolve a specific database issue and then delete it immediately after the issue is resolved. This user can access all SAP HANA Cloud monitoring views and all SAP Datasphere data in all spaces, including any sensitive data stored there.

The below knwoledge articles will help you to understand more on it's limitations

3469992 - Database user on Space-level is not able to consume tables and all schemas in SAP Datasphere - SAP for Me

3469023 - Unable to access SAP datasphere Local table in the database explorer for viewing data - SAP for Me

3428316 - Integrating SAP Datasphere's data via Database Users/Open SQL Schemas - SAP for Me

 

Regards,

Venkatesh

entry.title: Re: container.getTransformationParameters() seems to be d...
entry.content:
You could also just replace it with:

DynamicConfiguration conf =
(DynamicConfiguration)container.getInputParameters().getValue(StreamTransformationConstants.DYNAMIC_CONFIGURATION);

entry.title: SAP MDK: How to take user roles?
entry.content:
Good afternoon community. I have an MDK application in which I need to access the roles of the logged in user to know which buttons or screens to show. I am making a basic example trying to show or hide a particular button. This role is linked to a rule.

Now I'm just printing a string in the app that returns me useful information. But in roles I only see an array with a single string called "openid".

I was expecting to see the "Admin" role which I added to my user, but I don't see it. Here's how I have it configured. This is the logic of what you are seeing:

I know that the role works because I am getting information from my CAP service that the Admin role needs. My problem now is how to access the list of roles that the user who logged in has so that I can use that information to my advantage and be able to show certain information to the users within the application. I appreciate any information you can provide me.

checked the interface /IWBEP/IF_MGW_SOST_SRV_RUNTIME and its active as per snote - 1986626

Should attended and unattended automation have some different approachs? Do you have any idea about why unattended automation does not recognizes some screen elements?

Regards

entry.title: Nadchodzące spotkania SAP Community – wrzesień/październik 2024
entry.content:
Cześć Katowice SAP Community!

Dziś odbyło się w Katowicach luźne spotkanie przy piwie SAP Stammtisch: katowice-sap-stammtisch-10-09-2024

Cieszymy się, że udało się zorganizować spotkanie jeszcze na koniec lata 🍻

Dajcie znać w komentarzach pod tym postem lub na grupie LinkedIn: Silesia o Waszych propozycjach następnego terminu spotkania 💬

Z innych wydarzeń, dziejących się po sąsiedzku - @Bartek organizuje SIT Warszawa, bardzo merytoryczny i godny polecenia event SAPowy, który odbędzie się już 21 września. Zapisy i szczegóły na stronie:  sapinsidetrack2024

Dajcie znać pod postem, jeżeli się wybieracie na SIT do Warszawy 👍

Oprócz tego, jak co roku mamy możliwość uczestniczenia wirtualnie w SAP Tech Ed - szczegóły pod linkiem: teched

entry.title: IAS Resources and BTP Enabling IAS End-to-End Workshop - The Pre-Requisite to Joule AI
entry.content:
Please Note: SelectIng the option “Yes” to “Will you be attending?” Will NOT register you for the event. To register for the event, please click on “Register Here”.

The workshop's purpose is to enable our customers to understand the process of integrating HCM with SAP Cloud Identity Services in SuccessFactors. IAS is a prerequisite for Joule, Stories, Internal Career Site, and SAP Work Zone.

entry.title: Quote 2.0 Solution Design - Edit Sections in Other's Quotes.
entry.content:
How to make a Section, in Solution Design Tab, editable when accessing Quotes from Other Quotes tab?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Quote 2.0 Solution Design - Edit Sections in Other's...
entry.content:
When creating a Quote, with Solution Design enabled, a Quote Team named Quote Owner is automatically created.
In order to have other users edit the Sections it is required to create other Team with Edit Permissions(for example Administrator Team)

Teams might be created through Excel Template during Sections creation or manually created in Quote Teams tab. 

References:

  • Solution Design | SAP Help Portal
  • Quote Teams | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Multi resource scheduling heuristics SAP_MULT_SCH error
entry.content: The same happens with me. Both cases: alternative modes created via classification and also created via alternative sequence in the routing.

entry.title: Mobile order notification to kitchen
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are evaluating the functionality of Mobile Order. One of our customers want to have a screen in the kitchen area of the food booth in order to get a notification once the order is posted in CCO manager, because his business model requires to know the content of the order before the customer arrives to pick-up (to prepare the order items, for example, an hamburguer). Is this possible to achieve? How it can be done?

I appreciate your suggestions, thank you.

entry.title: Error downloading Metada in SAP Mobile Services
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

I have been developing a SAP MDK Application, and adding the feature "Enable Multiple User Mode" in "Native/MDK/{MyAppId}/Mobile Settings Exchange". In the section "Shared Devices". 

You can see in the picture, that in order to enable multiple user mode, you have to define a Passcode Policy, which I have.

But, what I have to do now is download the metada in "Settings/Security".

 

In order to upload it into "SAP BTP Cockpit/Security/Trust Configuration"

 

But, when I press the button to download the Metadata, it doesnt work.

I tried with diferent dates, but nothing works. 

When I'm debugging in Google, before it breaks, it shows this

I suppose this is a SAP error, but I dont know how to continue. Any help will be thank.

entry.title: Manually add Special stock indicator in production order component (Not an MTO)
entry.content:
Hi,

     I'm trying to block the Production order components under some special stock. There's no Sales order, its not an MTO. I'm thinking of having the component blocked under "project stock" by creating a dummy project. I created a dummy project , assigned the WBS element in the Production order and tried to enter special stock indicator as 2 (Project Stock),but it disappears when I try to save it. 

Could you help me understand how I can maintain it as Special Stock 2 (project stock) for the components.

The individual collective requirement type is set as 1(individual) in MRP 4.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Schedule background job in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud S...

entry.title: no Purchase Order displaying in Manage change request app
entry.content:
no Purchase Order displaying in Manage change request app

But I have orders in ME2N

what to do. I could not able to create any change request in create change request app also

entry.title: Is there a way to get the list of all the existing scheduled jobs in certain folder and stop them?
entry.content:
Is there a way to get the list of all the existing scheduled jobs in certain folder and stop them from CMC?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to get the list of all the existing sc...
entry.content:
To get a list of all scheduled jobs in a specific folder and stop them in the CMC, please follow:  

  1. Log into the CMC and go to the folder containing the scheduled jobs you want to stop,
  2. In the left pane, expand the folder and select "Schedules" (in the right pane, you will see a list of all scheduled jobs in that folder),
  3. Select the schedules you want to stop by checking the box next to each one,
  4. In the toolbar at the top, click the "Actions" dropdown menu, and select "Stop" to stop the selected schedules.

You can select multiple schedules at once to stop them all together. Make sure to stop the Adaptive Job Server process to prevent all scheduled jobs from running. After stopping schedules, you may want to disable them so they don't automatically resume when the server restart.

entry.title: Schedule buffer proposal calculation issue DDMRP
entry.content:
I have scheduled a job in schedule buffer profile calculation in DDMRP. But got the below issue. How to solve this.

'Incorrect dates or one of reorder point, safety or max stock levels is 0.'

As per my understanding this job will updated the safety stock in material master. Here I hope system trying to update it to 0. but its not updating. Please let me know why

entry.title: Re: Performance Management and API: How to query performance rating via ODATA v2 API as an admin use
entry.content:
Hi @Makki_Chen 

Thank you for this blog ! I spent entire days trying to get the manual overall rating from a Performance form to feed an MDF object using Integration center last year and was never able to. All the technical details you provide comfort me in the idea that it is indeed not possible with a "standard" IC job and that some code edits are needed to make this work.

Very useful blog for the pay for performance community as we have many cases for which we need to query performance ratings through API such as the latest comment on my blog here for example. We had to find workarounds which we did but they don't always work as per the latest comment regarding multiple performance forms in the system.

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/how-to-use-performance-ratings-in-compensation-eligibility-rules/bc-p/13859865

Xavier

entry.title: Re: How to use Performance Ratings in Compensation Eligibility Rules
entry.content:
Hi @35969 

Please take a look at this blog, it could be help you (see my comment at the bottom too).

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/performance-management-and-api-how-to-query-performance-rating-via-odata-v2/bc-p/13861478#M7704

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Learning ILX - right arrow in Invest in Myself does not display all cards; need to click on View All
entry.content:
SAP SuccessFactors Learning ILX does not display all cards when scrolling right. User still needs to "View All" 

Clicking the right arrow brings up just two more cards instead of the additional 6:

entry.title: Re: Can Billing Plan be activated for a Service Material...
entry.content: I found the answear, no the answear is no because the CBC configuration - Assign Item Categories where the Manual Item Category could be entered is greyed out meaning we can not edit it for SERV.

entry.title: Re: Custom data as table, CDS, Domain, Business object and all that jazz...
entry.content:
@amitg1275For your scenario, you need to use Custom Business Configuration instead of Custom Business Objects.

Custom Business Configuration is the tool designed for developers to create SM30-like maintenance dialogs. Using CBC you you are the owner of the objects, so you can read them or create anything you want on top of them.

You can check following tutorial https://developers.sap.com/group.abap-env-factory.html 

I created a table and can maintain its entries using Custom Business Configurations app. I also can read entries on the table using a CDS view.

entry.title: Re: Massachusetts - Supplemental vs Base Wages
entry.content: Euna - Thanks for the response! I somehow missed the notification from weeks back. For us we do have wage types that need to be marked as "2" for PC68 because we want them to calculate as supplemental for taxes (ex: bonuses). What BSI and SAP both told us is that we needed to remove those supplemental wage types from the cumulation class 14 (Base wage for BSI) because this is meant just for what would be considered "base wages". The issue came up with MA for an employee who got a PTO payout which we tax as supplemental. When it tried to calculate MA tax which annualizes, it pulled that PTO payout into the annualized total with the employee's regular wages because we had it marked for cumulation 14.

entry.title: Withholding tax table taxable amount error
entry.content:
hi,

here in mexico there are multiple wtax for invoicing, when we need to update the watx table sap is giving an error that the taxable amount on every line should not exceed the base amount of the invoice, the problem is that in order to calculate the correct wtax amount the taxable amount needs to be 100% of the base amount on every line

 

 
 

 

what is the logic in sap b1 to not let us save the invoice if the taxable amount of every line is greater that the invoice amount?

hope you can help

thanks

entry.title: Re: A Natural Choice: SAP AIF can now expose events to Advanced Event Mesh to power your EDA
entry.content: Great post! I'm looking forward to learning more about AIFEM and how it integrates with SAP AIF. This is really exciting, and I'd love to see more content on how this can be leveraged in different use cases. Keep it coming!

entry.title: Re: Bounce Details Amazon SES
entry.content:
Hello Joyca,

An invalid email address should produce a hard bounce. In such case, the expected bounce type returned by Amazon should be 'permanent' as per the following AWS documentation.

https://docs.aws.amazon.com/ses/latest/dg/notification-contents.html#bounce-types

If SAP does not get back that precise bounce type value then everything else is considered as soft bounce. And because of that, SAP can't provide further details as the sub type returned does not match the expected sub types that usually soft bounces would get. So the first step would be to know which bounce type is returned for your email sendings. Maybe create an incident for Amazon or try to look at their bounce monitoring tool. 

Also, some users have experienced a different bounce type returned by Amazon for invalid domains. See the following post: https://repost.aws/knowledge-center/ses-understand-soft-bounces

If the expected bounce type is returned correctly by Amazon then feel free to create an incident for SAP Marketing Cloud and we will be glad to assist.

Best regards,

Martin Parent

SAP Marketing Cloud Development.

entry.title: Re: AL11 directory file to DMS Data upload
entry.content:
Hey guys, I was facing the same problem, my files were being saved but with 0 kbs, the solution found was to upload the file through the API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV api.

Tks

entry.title: Is possible to use Introscope without SAP Solution Manager?
entry.content:
Sometimes customers have doubts about whether it is possible to use Introscope without SAP Solution Manager. And what are the license rights?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is possible to use Introscope without SAP Solution Ma...
entry.content:
Yes, it is possible to use Introscope without SAP Solution Manager.

Introscope is a standalone application performance monitoring tool that can be used independently.
However, please consult the specific terms and conditions of the Introscope license agreement provided by the vendor for information on license rights. The license rights may vary depending on the version, edition, and specific terms agreed upon during the purchase. To obtain accurate information regarding license rights, it is recommended to review the license agreement or contact the vendor directly.

Additionally, please confirm whether you are using the free version (Right to View - RTV) or the full version. If you are using the free version, there should be no problem moving it as it is not bound to any IP. However, if you are using the full version, please confirm your contract type. Please note that the RTV version is not customizable.

entry.title: SAP Business One Electronic Document Service missing two protocols for AvalaraTaxRateProviderClient
entry.content:
SAP Business One Powered by SQL SAP Business One v10 FP240 HF1 trying to get Avalara Tax Rates service working and the protocol connectors were missing after installation of the Electronic Document Service.

 

I reviewed SAP Note 2952067 which discusses editing the appsettings.json file to enable the relevant protocol.  I have copied the original and edited files into the question.  In both files you see the two protocols required: AvalaraTaxRateProviderClient-1 and TaxRateCache-1 in the json files but they do not come with a parameter of Active = True or false.   I tried to add it, but when I did the EDS Dashboard would not launch, so clearly I do not know how to edit.

Any guidance available?  @ANKIT_CHAUHAN

entry.title: In SAP SF Learning, once a quiz is completed, they system still displays "Try Again".
entry.content:
Once a quiz is completed, the system displays "Try Again" button (Label ID: label.Quiz.TryAgain). The system does not move on to the next content object in the item. Often times, teammates at my company select "Try Again" instead of selecting the next content object on the left side of the screen. This makes them re-take the quiz over and over again.

Can we remove the button altogether if a quiz is passed? Or can we have the system automatically move on to the next content object in the item if the quiz is passed?

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA Floor Price Setting
entry.content: vvvvvv

entry.title: Re: Transaction ME3L output internal table
entry.content: What about the values used in the calculation?

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA Floor Price Setting
entry.content:
Hi Fancy,

Thanks so much for this! I have a few follow up questions, if you don't mind. I'm new to the whole pricing configuration side, so again, please feel free to point me to any additional resources. 

In reading your notes, I'm particularly interested in the customised sales pricing procedure and the In-App or DEV Extensions, so I am reading up on these. 

In terms of configuring the Sales Region Floor Price as a statistical value only, does that block the order from going further, or does that need to work in concert with the extensions? 

Would you be able to point me to any KB documents which could help me in doing the above? If it is a statistical value for the floor price, can I in theory have two PPR0s on the same Sales Order? My understanding was that this was not possible. 

Thank you so much for your help, my apologies for being a bother!

MaryAnne

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account (SAP Universal ID) and getting started in the community

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Dat Locking Format
entry.content: Thank you! Managing the data locks from a story is very useful.

entry.title: Data Templates for Concur Data Delivery Service (DDS) : SYSTEM MANAGEMENT SAC Story
entry.content:
Overview

The Data Templates for the Concur Data Delivery Service (DDS) Expense content package offers a powerful solution for visualizing and analyzing data captured in SAP Concur Expense. Seamlessly integrated with SAP Data Delivery Services and utilizing the SAP Analytics Cloud for data visualization, this solution provides administrators with comprehensive insights into organizational expenses, system administration, and user distributions. Its advanced analytics capabilities include robust auditing and control features essential for fraud detection and compliance assurance.

Built upon Analytical Models in SAP Datasphere and visualized in SAP Analytics Cloud, this content package encompasses a suite of detailed stories that deliver in-depth perspectives on expense management. These insights empower administrators to make informed decisions, optimize expense workflows, and enhance overall financial governance.

The System Management SAC Story offers an overview of employee distribution that can assist user administrators to better manage their users’ profiles. The tab entitled Employee Details enables the ability to look up a particular employee profile and see the most important information associated with their profile. This can help user administrators to easily manage and update user profiles where necessary.

System Overview

This dashboard offers an overview of employee distribution that can assist user administrators to better manage their users’ profiles.  

  • Total Number of Active/Terminated Employees:  A quick glance on the total active or inactive user profiles.  
  • Employee Regional Distribution: Helps to analyze how employees are located worldwide per region.  
  • Employee Ledger Distribution: Helps to analyze how employees are split across ledgers.  
  • Active vs. Inactive Employees: Provides a percentage of active vs. inactive employees.  
  • New vs. Terminated Employees Over Time: Tracks the number of employee profiles created or terminated over period of time.  
  • Employee Role Distribution: Provides the total number of roles assigned for employees.  
  • Employee Information – Details: Provides a detailed view on every single employee profile.  

 

Employee Details

This dashboard enables to look up a particular employee profile and see the most important information associated with their profile. This can help user administrators to easily manage and update user profiles where necessary.  

  • Employee Basic Information: This table provides essential employee information, such as e-mail address, start date, country or ledger.  
  • Employee Details: This table provides information where in the company structure the employee belongs to, based on company-defined Org Unit and Custom fields. 
  • Default Approver: The table provides basic information about the employee’s default approvers.   
  • Associated Delegate: The table list all delegates of the selected employee.  
  • Assigned Roles: The table lists all assigned roles of the selected employee. 
  • Employee Details table: The table provides basic user information that enables to compare various employees.  

 

 

Resources:

  • https://www.concur.com/data-delivery-service
  • https://api.sap.com/package/SAPConcurExpenseDDSIntegrationwithSAPDatasphere/overview
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/spend-management-blogs-by-sap/data-templates-for-dds-expense-administra...
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/spend-management-blogs-by-sap/data-templates-for-concur-data-delivery-e...
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/spend-management-blogs-by-sap/data-templates-for-concur-data-delivery-service-dds-policy-compliance-sac/ba-p/13811486

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Broadcasting Stories
entry.content:
Hi - Is there a way to broadcast a story/report in SAC and to be sent daily/weekly to a set of email addresses?

Is this possible? If so, is there a guide available? Currently, we are using the SAC tenant that is part of SMC.

Cheers,

Marc
